seoTitle: Prince Of Wales vs Promisedland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Prince Of Wales and Promisedland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Prince Of Wales vs Promisedland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Prince Of Wales and Promisedland.
heading: Prince Of Wales vs Promisedland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Prince Of Wales, Queensland and Promisedland, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Promisedland has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Prince Of Wales (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Prince Of Wales or Promisedland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Prince Of Wales has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Promisedland scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Prince Of Wales scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Promisedland scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Prince Of Wales or Promisedland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Promisedland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
